description: Added a new experimental `WithProcessCommand` API so AppHost authors can expose process-backed resource commands — commands that run local tools, scripts, or CLIs and capture their output. Supports static and dynamic process specs, stdin, environment variables, bounded output, and a factory variant for TypeScript polyglot AppHosts. The `IInteractionService` now correctly returns `IsAvailable=false` during non-interactive CLI resource command execution.
name: Process-backed resource commands
